input-border.$description: Border style for standard variant Text Field & Select

action-focus.$description: Fill background for components in focus state (List, Table, etc)

action-disabled-bg.$description: Fill background for components in disabled state (List, Table, etc)

action-disabled.$description: Content color for components in disabled state (Button, List, Table, etc)

action-selected.$description: Fill background for components in selected state (List, Table, etc)

action-hover.$description: Fill background for components in hover state (List, Table, etc)

action-active.$description: Fill color for components in active state (List, Table, etc)

secondary-main.$description: Secondary color used by most components

primary-main.$description: Main color used by most components
